## Skaven Mercenaries

#### 0-1 Grey Seer (Cost: 4 Glory)

Can be taken only by Vermintide Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Grey Seer | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+0 | \-2 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Grey Seer is equipped with Power Armour and a Warpstone Staff, included in its cost and statistics above. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Warpstone Staff.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword

The Grey Seer knows the following psychic powers:

* **Skitterleap (Effect).** 12”, Self or One Ally, Target Activation, the target has FLYING.  
* **Warp Lightning (Attack).** 12”, AUTOMATIC 2, PSYCHIC, RISKY, STUN  
* **Wither (Effect).** \-1 DICE, 12”, One Enemy, Immediate, the target gains D3 BLOOD MARKERS.

**Abilities**

* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Grey Seer Retreats.  
* **Warpstone Overcharge.** Once during each of its activations, when the Grey Seer uses a psychic power, it can gain \+1 DICE to the Success Roll, but if it does, it automatically suffers Perils of the Warp, regardless of the result.

**Keywords**  
ELITE, MASTER, PSYKER 1, SKAVEN

#### 0-1 Plague Priest (Cost: 4 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Warbands with a TZEENTCH leader, or by Heretic Astartes (Alpha Legion, Night Lords, or World Eaters).

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Plague Priest | 6”/Infantry | \+1 | \+1 | \-1 | 32mm |

**Battlekit**  
A Plague Priest is equipped with Standard Armour, a Light Plague Censer, and a Warpstone Staff, included in its cost and statistics above. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Light Plague Censer.** Melee, GAS, \-1 INJURY DICE. Enemies within 1” of the wielder that do not have NEGATE GAS have \-1 DICE to all Success Rolls.  
* **Warpstone Staff.** Melee, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY, additional \+1 INJURY DICE against targets with DAEMON or PSYKER Keyword

The Plague Priest knows the following psychic powers:

* **Bile-Torrent (Attack).** 10”, AUTOMATIC 2, PSYCHIC, RISKY, INFECTION MARKERS  
* **Entropy (Attack).** 14”, \+1 INJURY DICE, PSYCHIC, RISKY  
* **Filth-Crust (Effect).** 6”, Self or One Ally, End of Turn, the target has an additional \-1 to Injury rolls, stacking with armour and shields only up to a total of \-3.

**Abilities**

* **Frenzied Assault.** The Plague Priest rolls 2D6 instead of 1D6 when Charging, taking the highest result.  
* **Pestilence-Pestilence\!** At the start of the Plague Priest’s Activation, if there is at least one enemy with an INFECTION MARKER within 6” of it, the Plague Priest gains 1 BLESSING MARKER.  
* **Scurry Away.** Enemies do not get to make a free attack when the Plague Priest Retreats.

**Keywords**  
MASTER, NURGLE, PSYKER 1, SKAVEN

#### 0-1 Rat Swarm (Cost: 3 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Chaos Daemons or Heretic Astartes Warbands

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Rat Swarm | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 40-50mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Rat Swarm is equipped with its Swarming Bites. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

* **Swarming Bites.** Melee, Hits all targets in melee during wielder’s Activation

**Abilities**

* **Skitter.** The Rat Swarm has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, FEAR, LARGE, NO PROMOTION, REGENERATE 1, SKAVEN, SWARM, TOUGH

#### 0-2 Skaven Rat (Cost: 2 Glory)

Cannot be taken by Chaos Daemons or Heretic Astartes Warbands.

| Name | Movement | Ranged | Melee | Armour | Base |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| Skaven Rat | 8”/Infantry | N/A | \+0 | 0 | 25mm |

**Battlekit**  
The Skaven Rat has no battlekit, but it is always considered to be equipped with a Close Combat Weapon. You cannot change its battlekit in any way.

**Abilities**

* **Dodge.** All attacks against the Skaven Rat have \-1 DICE to Hit.  
* **Expendable.** The Skaven Rat is not counted as part of your Warband for the purposes of Morale.  
* **Pet.** Select one other non-ARTIFICIAL, non-BEAST model in your Warband at the start of the battle. The Skaven Rat forms a FIRETEAM with that model. That model is its owner.  
* **Skitter.** The Skaven Rat has \+1 DICE to all Climb, Dash, Jump, and Diving Charge Success Rolls.  
* **Strength in Numbers.** The Skaven Rat has \+1 DICE to Hit with melee attacks made against any enemy that has at least 2 of the Skaven Rat’s SKAVEN allies within 1” of it.

**Keywords**  
BEAST, NO PROMOTION, SKAVEN, STEALTH
